name: HMCS Kokanee (K 419)
events: 25 Aug 1944 HMS L 27 (Lt. J.N. Elliott, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS Beacon Hill (T/Lt.Cdr. E.T. Simmons, DSO, RCNVR) and HMCS Kokanee (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Marshall, RCNVR). (1)

2 Dec 1944 HMS Vengeful (Lt. A.S. Melville-Ross, DSC, RN) conducted night A/S exercises off Larne with HMCS Kokanee (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Marshall, RCNVR), HMCS St. Thomas (T/A/Lt.Cdr. L.P. Denny, RCNR) and HMCS Rivière du Loup (T/Lt. R.N. Smillie, RCNVR). (2)
2 Dec 1944 HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Larne with Escort Group C3.

This group was made up of the frigate HMCS Kokanee (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Marshall, RCNVR) and the corvettes HMCS Forrest Hill (T/Lt. F.R. Brebner, RCNVR), HMCS Rivière du Loup (T/Lt. R.N. Smillie, RCNVR), HMCS St. Thomas (T/A/Lt.Cdr. L.P. Denny, RCNR) and HMCS Trillium (T/Lt. K.E. Meredith, RCNVR). [Maybee not all vessels participated in the exercise though. One more corvette of the group was at Halifax.] (3)
